# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-docker-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
    purpose: ci-cd
  annotations:
    description: "CI/CD pod for building and pushing Docker images"
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  securityContext:
    runAsUser: 1000
    runAsGroup: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
    - name: docker-builder
      image: docker:27.1-dind
      imagePullPolicy: Always
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "512Mi"
          ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2000m"
          memory: "2Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: "tcp://localhost:2376"
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY
          value: "1"
        - name: DOCKER_CERT_PATH
          value: "/certs/client"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-certs
          mountPath: /certs/client
          readOnly: true
        - name: workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 30
        periodSeconds: 30
        timeoutSeconds: 10
        failureThreshold: 3
      readinessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 3
    - name: dind-daemon
      image: docker:27.1-dind
      imagePullPolicy: Always
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
      command:
        - dockerd
        - "--host=tcp://0.0.0.0:2376"
        - "--tlsverify"
        - "--tlscacert=/certs/ca/ca.pem"
        - "--tlscert=/certs/server/server-cert.pem"
        - "--tlskey=/certs/server/server-key.pem"
        - "--storage-driver=overlay2"
        - "--userns-remap=default"
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "512Mi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2000m"
          memory: "4Gi"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-certs-server
          mountPath: /certs/server
          readOnly: true
        - name: docker-certs-ca
          mountPath: /certs/ca
          readOnly: true
        - name: docker-certs
          mountPath: /certs/client
        - name: dind-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 30
        periodSeconds: 30
        timeoutSeconds: 10
  volumes:
    - name: docker-certs
      secret:
        secretName: docker-client-certs
        defaultMode: 0400
    - name: docker-certs-server
      secret:
        secretName: docker-server-certs
        defaultMode: 0400
    - name: docker-certs-ca
      secret:
        secretName: docker-ca-cert
        defaultMode: 0400
    - name: workspace
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: "5Gi"
    - name: tmp
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: "256Mi"
    - name: dind-storage
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: "20Gi"
  restartPolicy: Never
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "build"
      effect: "NoSchedule"
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  hostIPC: false
